title: docynia indica var. doumeri
intro: Docynia indica var. doumeri, also known as the Doumer's docynia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a shrub native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia, and is valued for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Docynia indica var. doumeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, which can be harnessed through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts.
